indicators.name: yoga mat on floor
indicators.rationale: A yoga mat is present, but it is not unrolled and is partially obscured by a cushion.

indicators.name: open floor space
indicators.rationale: There is enough open space on the floor to accommodate a yoga mat and some stretching.

indicators.name: pillow on floor
indicators.rationale: A pillow is on the floor, which could be a hazard if someone were to do yoga or stretch.

indicators.name: chair in room
indicators.rationale: A chair is in the room, which could obstruct the open floor space needed for yoga.

indicators.name: cushion on floor
indicators.rationale: A cushion is on the floor, which could be a hazard if someone were to do yoga or stretch.

reasoning_summary: The room has some open floor space suitable for yoga, but there are several objects on the floor that could pose a risk. The presence of a chair and cushion on the floor also limits the usability of the space for yoga.
